subject: New Request: Python Developer – Python
body:
Hi,

We have a new opening in the fintech sector that might be of interest.

Our client is looking for a architect Python Developer with strong experience in Python. The right candidate has solid knowledge of:
• Python
• Kubernetes
• MongoDB

Details:
Client: Kredify
Start: 2020-11-12
Duration: 12 months
Location: Göteborg (on-site)
Rate: competitive (details on request)

Don't hesitate to get in touch!

Best regards,
Anna Berg
Senior Recruitment Consultant
NordStaff AB
Tel: +46 72 123 45 67
